title: BlueDot — AI Governance course

summary: Interactive map of ongoing AI governance initiatives across countries and bodies. Browse to see who's doing what.

title: International AI treaty open letter
summary: Open letter and campaign for an international treaty on AI. A way to read the case being made and consider signing.

title: Introduction to Compute Governance
summary: Light intro article to compute governance — why compute is a useful policy lever for AI.

title: International AI Safety Report
summary: The international scientific report on AI safety — a flagship reference document on the state of risks and capabilities.

title: Mutually assured AI malfunction
summary: Blog post exploring whether ASI deterrence dynamics could mirror nuclear MAD — speculative but worth thinking through.

title: AI Policy Levers: A Review of the U.S. Government's Tools
summary: Reference paper cataloguing the policy tools the U.S. government has to shape AI development and deployment.

title: EU AI Act
summary: The official text and structure of the EU AI Act — the world's first comprehensive AI regulation.

title: EU AI Act explainer
summary: Short explainer on the EU AI Act from the European Parliament — read this before the act itself.

title: Helen Toner on the geopolitics of AI in China and the Middle East
summary: Long interview with one of the most respected voices on AI policy — covers China, the Middle East, and the politics of frontier AI.

title: AI and labour markets
summary: arXiv preprint on AI's effects on labour markets and work.

title: AI job displacement in 2026
summary: Popular-press take on where AI is reshaping employment now.

title: Artificial Intelligence, Automation and Work
summary: Influential economics paper on how AI and automation reshape labour markets — a foundational read for thinking about the future of work.

title: AI must complement workers, not replace them
summary: Short article-and-podcast arguing for an AI development direction that supports shared prosperity.

title: 57 useful resources for upskilling in AI policy
summary: Big curated list of AI policy resources — courses, fellowships, reading, podcasts. The single most useful starting point if you're moving toward policy work.

title: AI governance research ideas
summary: Open document of governance research questions worth attacking — pick one your background fits and write something.
